title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker16: coap_status.c
notes: Commit: dd653a5 - removed unreachable >255 checks (dead code) in cbor_put_*_header per no-dead-code rule. Resolved merge conflicts in beads tracking. Verified coap_status.c consistent across worktrees.
